meaning: 特拉帕尼[意大利西西里岛西北岸港市]
examples: Gina Trapani is the author of Upgrade Your Life and founding editor of Lifehacker.com.
“IT IS very tricky to sack a cousin, ” observes Francesco Trapani, the chief executive of Bulgari.
Gina Trapani, the editor of Lifehacker, USES each of these tools several times a day as she writes.
Trapani has eschewed the temptation to follow other purveyors of luxury goods down the catwalk.
If the glitterati would no longer visit Bulgari there, Trapani would take his wares to them.
